name: BLT Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup KRAFT Shredded Whole Milk Mozzarella
8 slices of OSCAR MAYER Bacon, cut into 1/4s cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the bread shell with mayonnaise.
2. Layer with tomatoes, cheese, and bacon.
3. Cook in a 450°F oven for 5 to 7 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
4. Top with lettuce. Makes 4 servings.
